Lisa Berkowitz, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SUSAN DAVIS.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views. Plaintiff reports the status of depositions, argues harassment, discrimination. Defendant Argues and opposes a continuance. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SUSAN DAVIS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Continued to January 8, 2020 at 9:00 am in Dept 302. Supplemental Opposition papers due by 12/27/19; Supplemental reply papers due by 1/3/20. In addition, the deposition of the two people that have been noticed but have not been taken by the Plaintiff must occur prior to 12/20/19 and any ex parte Discovery application related to this matter should be brought before Judge Kahn in Dept. 302. Parties may also stipulate to change dates as long as they inform the Court. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition And Produce Documents In Deposition Notice (Continued From 8/20/19 Per Ex Parte Order File 8/9/19)
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. MAUREEN E. MCFADDEN, ESQ. of Law Office of Maureen E. McFadden (Tel: 925-209-5949) appearing via CourtCall for the plaintiff;
Deputy City Attorney LISA B. BEKOWITZ of Office of the City Attorney of the City and County of San Francisco (Tel: 415-554-3825) appearing for defendant City and County of San Francisco.

Hearing Re: Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition And Produce Documents In Deposition Notice.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification: As to Defendant's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition And Produce Documents In Deposition, The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted, modified as follows: Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel plaintiff's deposition is granted. Plaintiff shall make himself available for deposition no later than September 13, 2019. In addition, Plaintiff shall produce at least two business day prior to the deposition the documents sought in the deposition notice served by the City on March 5, 2019, if they have not already been produced.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
